# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-job
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-job
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-job
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: default
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 3000
        fsGroup: 2000
      containers:
      - name: processor
        image: my-batch-image:latest
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 3000
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
        args:
        - |
          echo "Starting batch job"
          # Add your batch processing commands here
          echo "Batch job completed"
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      restartPolicy: Always
